# terrible_check_point_mgmt_cp_mgmt_vpn_community_star (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Object name.

### Optional

- `advanced_properties` (String) Advanced properties. Available from R82 JHF management version.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `center_gateways` (String) Collection of center VPN Gateway and VPN Device objects identified by the name or UID.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `color` (String) Color of the object. Should be one of existing colors.
- `comments` (String) Comments string.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `details_level` (String) The level of detail for some of the fields in the response can vary from showing only the UID value of the object to a fully detailed representation of the object.
- `disable_nat` (Boolean) Indicates whether to disable NAT inside the VPN Community. Available from R82 JHF management version.
- `disable_nat_on` (String) Indicates on which gateways to disable NAT inside the VPN Community. Available from R82 JHF management version.
- `encrypted_traffic` (String) Encrypted traffic settings. Available from R82 JHF management version.
- `encryption_method` (String) The encryption method to be used. Available from R80.10 management version.
- `encryption_suite` (String) The encryption suite to be used. Available from R80.10 management version.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `excluded_services` (String) Collection of services that are excluded from the community identified by the name or UID.<br> Connections with these services will not be encrypted and will not match rules specifying the community in the VPN community. Available from R82 JHF management version.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `granular_encryptions` (String) VPN granular encryption settings. Available from R81 management version.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ignore_warnings` (Boolean) Apply changes ignoring warnings.
- `ike_phase_1` (String) Ike Phase 1 settings. Only applicable when the encryption-suite is set to [custom]. Available from R80.10 management version.
- `ike_phase_2` (String) Ike Phase 2 settings. Only applicable when the encryption-suite is set to [custom]. Available from R80.10 management version.
- `mep` (String) Multiple Entry Point properties. Available from R82 JHF management version.
- `mesh_center_gateways` (Boolean) Indicates whether the meshed community is in center.
- `override_vpn_domains` (String) The Overrides VPN Domains of the participants GWs. Available from R80.40 management version.
- `permanent_tunnels` (String) Permanent tunnels properties. Available from R82 JHF management version.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `routing_mode` (String) VPN Community Routing Mode. Available from R82 JHF management version.
- `satellite_gateways` (String) Collection of Gateway objects representing satellite gateways identified by the name or UID.
- `shared_secrets` (String) Shared secrets for external gateways. Available from R80.10 management version.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `tunnel_granularity` (String) VPN tunnel sharing option to be used. Available from R81 management version.
- `use_shared_secret` (Boolean) Indicates whether the shared secret should be used for all external gateways. Available from R80.10 management version.
- `vpn_routing` (String) Enable VPN routing to satellites. Available from R82 JHF management version.
- `wire_mode` (String) VPN Community Wire mode properties. Available from R82 JHF management version.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `cp_mgmt_vpn_community_star` (String) The checkpoint object created or updated.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
